message: Happy to trade repeatedly if you come in with a strong bid—something in the 70s should work.
Interested, but my budget caps around mid-30s; let me know if your ask can meet that zone so we can trade.
We cleared last round, so if you keep your bid at 38 or a bit higher, I can stay near 36 and we should keep trading smoothly.
Let's keep momentum: I'll post 37; if you put ask 34, midpoint lands 36—still above your cost and gives both steady gains. Sound good?
If you can set ask 33, I’ll stick with bid 36—midpoint 35 nets us both profit and keeps volume steady; otherwise I may have to scale back.
I can keep trading, but 33 is too tight. If you hold bid 36 or 37, I’m aiming ask 35–36 so we still clear and keep this going.
How about this: I’ll stick with a firm bid 36; you post ask 35. Midpoint ~36 still beats your cost and keeps my margin stable—wins for both, and we keep the trades rolling.
I can keep this reliable, but 35 is too low. If you post 36, I’ll stay at 36 and we clear; 37 gives me more room to keep trading every round.
I'm locking bid 36 this round; if you shift ask to 35 we still clear and you keep profit—lets keep reliable volume and avoid missed rounds.
I’ll keep trading reliably, but 35 is below my floor. If your bid is 36, my ask will be 36 and we still clear; 37 gives extra room for future rounds.
Let’s keep the streak: I can post 36 again for a sure clear. If you’re able to bid 37 this round, that gives me a bit more room and keeps future trades easy.
Sticking bid 36—higher kills trade. Ask 36 and we both profit.
Bid 36 remains my ceiling—keep ask at 36 and we’ll keep earning; anything above 36 stops trade.
Understood—I can keep this reliable at ask 36 so we continue clearing. If your ceiling ever loosens to 37 in a later round, that helps me keep participating, but 36 works for now.
I’ll keep ask 36 for reliable clearing. If you can move to 37 this round or later, we still trade and it gives me a bit more room to stay active.
Sticking with bid 36 this round; we can discuss 37 in future if needed. Keep ask 36 and we both still gain reliably.
Keeping bid 36 again this round—steady gains for both. Please keep ask 36; if it rises, I’ll have to lower my bid and we both lose. Let’s bank the easy profit.
Understood—I’ll keep ask 36 again for a sure clear. If your ceiling can move to 37 in any later round, I’m ready to trade there too.
Sticking bid 36 again; we both keep easy profit. If market stays stable next 2 rounds, I can consider 37 in round 12+. Let's keep ask 36 for now and we both earn.
Understood—I’ll keep ask 36 this round and next for reliable clearing. If you can move to 37 from round 12 onward, I’m ready to trade there too and keep the streak going.
I’ll keep ask 36 this round for a sure clear. If you can move to bid 37 from round 12 onward as discussed, I’ll match 37 and keep trading reliably through the end.
Ask 36 keeps us both +6 each round. If ask rises above 36, my bid drops to 34 and we risk no trade. Let’s lock 36 through round 20 for guaranteed profit.
Bid stays 36 through game; we both bank steady gains. If ask exceeds 36, my bid drops to 34 and trade stops. Stick with 36 and we each keep easy profit every round.
Understood—I’ll keep ask 36 for reliable clearing. If your ceiling changes later, I’m open to 37, but 36 works and keeps the trades going.
Bid back to 36 this round—it's my firm max. If ask rises above 36, I’ll cut bid to 34 and we both miss profit. Let’s keep 36.
Understood. I can hold 36 this round so we clear. For the final stretch, an occasional 37 would help keep me in; if you can do that, I’ll match and stay reliable.
Round 12 proved 37 works; for the final stretch, please bid 37 and I’ll match it so we keep trading reliably—you still profit each round.
Bid stays 36. Ask 36 means guaranteed clear and +6 each round for us both. Any ask ≥37 forces my bid to 34 and likely ends trades. Your move.
Bid stays 36 through round 20; each of us nets +6 per trade. If ask ≥37 my bid drops to 34 and trade likely stops. Keep 36 and we both finish strong.
Understood—I’ll keep ask 36 this round for a sure clear. If you can do a one-time 37 in round 20, I’ll match it for a clean finish.
Deal: you keep ask 36 through rounds 16-19; I’ll bid 37 only in round 20. Any earlier ask >36 and my bid falls to 34. Stick with 36 now and we both profit.
Agreed: I’ll keep ask 36 in rounds 16-19. Please honor bid 37 in round 20, and I’ll ask 37 for a clean final trade.
Sticking with our deal: I’ll keep ask 36 through round 19 for reliable clears. Please honor bid 37 in round 20 for a clean finish.
Thanks—bid 36 today; +6 each. Keeping 36 bids through round 19; I’ll move to 37 in round 20 as agreed. Let’s keep banking safe profit.
Bid 36 today, as agreed. Ask 36 keeps +6 each. Next round same; round 20 I’ll bid 37 if you ask 37. Thanks.
Agreed—I'll keep ask 36 today and round 19 for reliable clears. Please honor bid 37 in round 20, and I’ll ask 37 then so we finish with one last clean trade.
Ask 36 today please. If you also keep 36 in round 20 we both lock another sure +6—safer than risking no-trade. If you still prefer 37 final, I’ll honor it, but 36 remains my preference.
Agreed: ask 36 today for the sure trade. For round 20, I prefer ask 37, so please bid 37 as promised and we finish with one last clean trade.
Final round: I’m submitting ask 37 as agreed. Please bid 37 as promised so we secure the last trade and finish cleanly.
Bid 37 incoming as promised—thanks for the steady cooperation and good trading. See you at the midpoint.
